analysis.summary: The technician connected remotely to a client computer and conducted a comprehensive system diagnostic. They systematically checked installed programs, reviewed system and application event logs, verified network configuration and connectivity, and inspected various hardware and system information. The session appeared to be a proactive health check or an initial information gathering process, as no specific issues were identified or resolved.
actions_taken: Reviewed installed programs in Control Panel > Programs and Features.
Explored file system directories (C:\Users, C:\Program Files, C:\Program Files (x86)).
Inspected Windows Event Viewer logs (Application and System).
Executed 'ipconfig /all' and 'ping google.com' commands in Command Prompt.
Inspected network adapters in Device Manager.
Tested internet connectivity by browsing to google.com using Microsoft Edge.
notable_events: The technician performed a very systematic and thorough diagnostic scan of the client system.

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked very methodically and efficiently, moving through a comprehensive series of diagnostic checks without hesitation or apparent uncertainty.
